name: Arroz Con Pollo{chicken with Rice}
recipeIngredient: 10 oz. frozen green peas, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Place chicken in an ungreased rectangular baking dish, skin sides up. Sprinkle with salt, paprika, and black pepper.
3. Bake uncovered for 30 minutes.
4. Heat broth to boiling.
5. Remove chicken from the dish and drain any excess fat.
6. In the same dish, mix together the hot broth, rice, chopped onion, garlic salt, dried oregano, ground turmeric, crumbled bay leaf, and thawed green peas.
7. Return the chicken to the dish on top of the rice mixture.
8. Cover with aluminum foil.
9. Bake in the preheated oven until the rice is cooked through and tender, and the thickest pieces of chicken are done, about 30 minutes. The liquid should be absorbed during this time.
